description: Mexican criminal group founded in 2012 by Felipe de Jesús Pérez Luna, alias El Ojos, operating primarily in Tláhuac, Iztapalapa, Milpa Alta, Xochimilco, and the State of Mexico. It emerged from splinter groups of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel and engages in drug trafficking, homicide, extortion, kidnapping, vehicle theft, fuel theft, and human trafficking. The group is currently led by relatives of El Ojos and remains active.
